name: Vegetable Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook vegetables in a small amount of boiling salted water until crisp-tender; drain.
2. Chop the vegetables fine.
3. Whip the egg until lemon-colored; add the melted margarine and milk. Blend well.
4. Add the chopped veggies, salt, and pepper to the mixture.
5. Pour into a baking dish coated with vegetable spray.
6. Cover and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until set.
Yield: 8 servings
Exchange/serving: 1 vegetable
Calories/serving: 36
